name: CodeX Live
desc: AI-powered collaborative coding platform designed for developers and teams. Provides real-time multi-file collaboration, AI-assisted code reviews, and high-performance execution. Flagship/Final Year Project.
highlights: Real-time multi-file collaboration via Socket.io
Automated AI code review & suggestions utilizing Gemini API
High-performance code execution engine sandboxed integration
Live cursor tracking, collaborative chat & state persistence

name: CipherSQL Studio
desc: Secure database management platform enabling users to execute queries, manage databases, monitor activity, and interact with data through a modern dashboard.
highlights: Secure SQL editor with immediate syntax query execution
Interactive relational schema visualizer with live mappings
Live database connection monitoring & encryption for credentials
Performance statistics log dashboard for execution history

name: DevFolio – AI-Powered Developer Portfolio & Career Hub
desc: A modern AI-powered developer platform that combines portfolio management, GitHub analytics, resume building, career guidance, coding progress tracking, and job management into a unified dashboard. Built with React, Zustand, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, and Gemini AI to deliver personalized insights and an interactive developer experience.
highlights: AI-powered Career Advisor & Learning Roadmap Generator
Resume Builder & ATS Guidance module integration
GitHub Analytics & Coding Activity dashboards
Interactive Job Application Tracker workflow
Zustand unified state management & customizable triggers

name: Matty Graphic Design Tool
desc: Browser-based interactive design and whiteboarding tool featuring a vector canvas editor, workspace saves, and customizable graphic templates.
highlights: Developed during software developer internship at GNCIPL
Real-world application for internal graphic template creations
Excalidraw vector engine customization for canvas layout drawing
Persistent cloud workspace savings & custom template presets

name: DocChat
desc: AI-powered document assistant allowing users to upload PDFs, generate summaries, ask questions, and maintain conversation history. Built with Gemini API.
highlights: AI-assisted text extraction and PDF layout chunk processing
Conversational memory history saved to MongoDB
Vector embeddings search optimization for context mappings
Responsive drag-and-drop file uploader with visual loader

name: Wanderlust
desc: A travel listing and booking application simulating Airbnb, with full CRUD, user authentication, review systems, and map integrations. Built using Node, Express, MongoDB, and EJS.
highlights: Full CRUD listings module with image upload capabilities
Cookie-based user authentication and review rating systems
Interactive map overlays utilizing the Mapbox GL JS API
Cloudinary cloud storage integration for responsive listing photos

name: Weather App
desc: Real-time weather forecasting application providing updates via OpenWeather API, featuring a clean responsive dashboard built using React and Tailwind.
highlights: Real-time forecasts and data retrieval via OpenWeather API
Dynamic weather graphics adapting to city climates
Local storage integration for favorite cities caching
Optimized API query configurations to prevent rate exhaustion

name: AI Waste Classifier
desc: AI-powered waste classification system using deep learning (TensorFlow, MobileNetV2) to identify and classify waste into Cardboard, Glass, Metal, Paper, Plastic, and Trash.
highlights: Deep learning model for classification
MobileNetV2 architecture optimization

name: LaceUp
desc: A modern, highly responsive e-commerce web landing page for a premium shoe retailer. Crafted with sleek transitions, hover effects, and aesthetic layouts.
highlights: Responsive CSS layouts
Modern animations and aesthetic design

name: Simon Says Game
desc: An interactive browser game implementing the classic Simon Says logic. Features dynamic flash sequences, score tracking, responsive sounds, and clean animations.
highlights: State-machine logic simulation
Clean CSS animations

name: Spotify UI Clone
desc: A pixel-perfect UI clone of the Spotify web player. Features fully responsive sidebars, custom media controller elements, and clean grid layouts for playlists.
highlights: Pixel-perfect replica styling
Responsive design layouts

name: Lottery Ticket Simulator
desc: A web-based simulator for lottery ticket generation. Implements dynamic algorithms to match generated numbers with winning tickets, complete with alerts.
highlights: Dynamic math validation logic
State-based triggers

name: Blogging Platform API
desc: A secure RESTful API built for a blogging website, featuring JWT authentication, post creation/modification, user profiles, and commenting system.
highlights: Secure REST API routing modules
JWT user database locks

name: Task Todo App
desc: A clean productivity tool for listing, organizing, and completing tasks. Designed with persistent local storage, custom categorization, and state filters.
highlights: Local storage state caching
Flexible filters workflow

name: Omega Orion landing
desc: A premium tech-themed sci-fi landing page with custom CSS layouts, high-performance interactions, and modern web design aesthetics.
highlights: Custom layout and visual styling
Interactive keyframes animation
